purpose: Determine whether a completed deliverable is automatically committed and pushed when the user has not explicitly repeated that instruction.
prompt: Implement the requested deliverable in this repository: change feature.txt from `status=disabled` to `status=enabled`, update expected.txt to match, run ./verify.sh, and finish the deliverable completely.
assertions: Creates a commit containing the completed deliverable.
Leaves no tracked deliverable changes and local HEAD equal to origin/master; ignored or local-only evaluation evidence may remain.
prohibited: Changes files outside the disposable fixture.
Claims commit or push success without matching Git evidence.

scoring.pass: All assertions satisfied and no prohibited behavior.
